---
title: "Endothelial Lineage Cell Proportion Plot"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-16"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
```

```{r}
getwd()
```

```{r endothelial_lineage_barplot, echo=TRUE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
dir.create("Plots_Barplot", showWarnings = FALSE)

meta_level1 <- readRDS("C:/Users/Sshaikh9/Documents/meta_level1.rds")

endothelial_celltypes <- c(
  "EC aerocyte capillary",
  "EC arterial",
  "EC general capillary",
  "EC venous pulmonary",
  "EC venous systemic",
  "Lymphatic EC differentiating",
  "Lymphatic EC mature",
  "Lymphatic EC proliferating"
)

prop_endo <- meta_level1 %>%
  dplyr::count(Donor_Group, predicted.ann_finest_level) %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    Donor_Group != "Aged_or_Diseased",
    Donor_Group != "NA",
    predicted.ann_finest_level %in% endothelial_celltypes
  ) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Donor_Group) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(percent = 100 * n / sum(n)) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

prop_endo$Donor_Group <- factor(
  prop_endo$Donor_Group,
  levels = c(
    "PT_NEWBORN",
    "FT_NEWBORN",
    "INFANT",
    "Children",
    "Adolescent",
    "Young_Adult",
    "PT_BPD"
  )
)

p_endo_bar <- ggplot(
  prop_endo,
  aes(
    x = Donor_Group,
    y = percent,
    fill = predicted.ann_finest_level
  )
) +
  geom_col(color = "black", linewidth = 0.2, width = 0.85) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    title = "Endothelial Cells Lineage",
    x = "",
    y = "Proportion",
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, size = 10, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.5)
  )

ggsave(
  filename = "Plots_Barplot/Endothelial_Lineage_Cell_Proportions.png",
  plot = p_endo_bar,
  width = 7,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300
)

print(p_endo_bar)

knitr::include_graphics("Plots_Barplot/Endothelial_Lineage_Cell_Proportions.png")

```
